session.user:
Run these format checks and report results: 1. uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/consolidate_learn_plans_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py 2. prettier --check docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md .github/workflows/consolidate-learn-plans.yml .claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans.md .claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans-plan.md 3. uv run pytest tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/ tests/commands/launch/ -v --timeout=30
Report results.
